name: io.github.MisterTK/semantex
title: Semantex — Semantic Code Search
description: Fully local semantic code search: ColBERT dense + BM25 sparse + optional reranking, exposed as MCP tools.

runtimeArguments.description: Run as MCP server over stdio.

environmentVariables.name: SEMANTEX_MAX_RSS_MB
environmentVariables.description: Soft cap on resident memory (MB) for the MCP server cache (default: 512). When exceeded, cached searchers are evicted.

environmentVariables.name: SEMANTEX_MCP_CACHE_SIZE
environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of cached searcher instances (default: 1). Each instance holds one project's open index in memory.

environmentVariables.name: SEMANTEX_REFRESH_SECS
environmentVariables.description: Trigger an automatic background reindex when the index is older than this many seconds (default: 3600).

environmentVariables.name: SEMANTEX_HTTP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the HTTP/SSE MCP transport (--http). Required whenever --allow-remote is used; optional on loopback unless --require-auth is passed. If unset, a --auth-token flag takes precedence, and if neither is given a token is auto-generated and persisted at ~/.semantex/http_token (0600 perms).

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token auth. Required when the server was started with --allow-remote or --require-auth; see SEMANTEX_HTTP_TOKEN.

stdio.description: Standard local MCP transport. Pass --toolset to scope the exposed tools.

http.description: HTTP/SSE transport. Binds 127.0.0.1 by default; --allow-remote to listen on all interfaces and REQUIRES bearer-token auth (--auth-token, SEMANTEX_HTTP_TOKEN, or an auto-generated token persisted at ~/.semantex/http_token). On loopback, auth is off by default; pass --require-auth to opt in.

routes.POST /mcp/{toolset}: Streamable HTTP — JSON-RPC body in, JSON-RPC body out. Requires bearer auth when enabled.
routes.GET /mcp/{toolset}/events: Server-Sent Events stream for notifications. Requires bearer auth when enabled.
